steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Python code to compute financial indicators for COPEL (December 2024 data)
price = 9.96
shares_out = 2977112191  # total outstanding shares (TOTAL_ISSUED - TREASURY)

assets = 57384156000.0  # Ativo Total ÚLTIMO 2024-12-31
cash = 4092601000.0
# We'll use Dív Bruta composed from: Empréstimos circulante + Empréstimos não circulante + Debêntures
short_loans = 3354502000.0  # 2.01.04 Empréstimos e Financiamentos (Circulante)
long_loans = 13989844000.0 # 2.02.01 Empréstimos e Financiamentos (Não Circulante)
debentures = 3920000000.0     # 6.03.03 Debêntures

divida_bruta = short_loans + long_loans + debentures
# Revenue and margins
revenue = 31774633000.0  # Receita líquida (Assume igual à receita de venda) as per 7.01 total
gross_profit = 4898040000.0  # Resultado Bruto
# 3.04 operational expenses net
operational_profit_before_interest_taxes = 4064248000.0  # EBIT (12 meses) - 3.05
ebit = operational_profit_before_interest_taxes
net_income = 2799370000.0

# Equity and assets for ROIC
equity_end = 25493448000.0  # Patrimônio Líquido Consolidado - Saldos Finais (ÚLTIMO 2024-09-30 ~ close to year end)
# Use assets for ROIC calculation: (Asset - Suppliers - Cash) as per definition
fornecedores = 2324423000.0  # Passivo Circulante - Fornecedores (2024-12-31)
caixa = cash
patrimonio_liquido = equity_end

# compute derived values
market_cap = price * shares_out
enterprise_value = market_cap + divida_bruta - cash
# EBITDA = EBIT + Depreciation & Amortization
dep_amort = 1465478000.0
ebitda = ebit + dep_amort
# LPA and EPS
eps = net_income / shares_out
lpa = eps
vpa = equity_end / shares_out
# P/Indicators
pt_ebit = price / (ebit / shares_out)
psr = price / (revenue / shares_out)
p_to_ativos = price / (assets / shares_out)
p_cap_giro = price / (((assets - fornecedores) - 0) / shares_out)
# 3-month adjustments - we set as None (N/A) due to data constraints
# Ratios (percentages)
marg_bruta = (gross_profit / revenue) * 100
marg_ebit = (ebit / revenue) * 100
marg_liquida = (net_income / revenue) * 100
ebit_por_ativo = (ebit / assets) * 100

# ROC and ROT
roi = (ebit) / ((assets) - fornecedores - caixa)
roe = (net_income) / (patrimonio_liquido)

liquidez_corr = ((assets - fornecedores - (0)) / (0)) if False else None
# We'll compute liquidity as (Ativo Circulante - Passivo Circulante) / Passivo Circulante
current_assets = 13041808000.0
current_liabilities = 10342380000.0
liquidez_corr = (current_assets - current_liabilities) / current_liabilities
# Div Br/ Patrim
div_br_patrim = divida_bruta / patrimonio_liquido
# Giro de ativos
giro_ativos = revenue / assets

# Evita NaN
print('Market cap:', market_cap)
print('Divida bruta:', divida_bruta)
print('Enterprise value:', enterprise_value)
print('EBITDA:', ebid := ebitda)
print('LPA:', lpa)
print('VPA:', vpa)
print('Marg Bruta (%):', marg_bruta)
print('Marg EBIT (%):', marg_ebit)
print('Marg Liquida (%):', marg_liquida)
print('EBIT / Ativo (%):', ebit_por_ativo)
print('ROIC (%):', (roi)*100)
print('ROE (%):', (roe)*100)
print('Liquidez Corr:', liquidez_corr)
print('Div Br/ Patrim:', div_br_patrim)
print('Giro Ativos:', giro_ativos)
print('P/L:', price / eps)
print('P/VP:', price / vpa)
print('P/EBIT:', price / (ebit / shares_out))
print('PSR:', price / (revenue / shares_out))
print('P/Ativos:', p_to_ativos)
print('P/Cap. Giro:', p_cap_giro)
print('EV/ EBITDA:', enterprise_value / ebid)
print('EV/ EBIT:', enterprise_value / ebit)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
